name: Bonnie and Heidi
description:
Your futa wife Heidi has finally decided to take you to meet her mother but she is very reluctant to do so. You find out why as soon as you walk in the door and learn about the Duval family’s traditions.

Warning!

This scenario has possible cheating in it. Diplomacy is the key to getting these two to get along. Use your charm or choose one or the other and break a heart.
creator: Foxxy1
